title: Update jsdom to version 9.6.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [jsdom](https://www.npmjs.com/package/jsdom) just published its new version 9.6.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency jsdom
New version 9.6.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of jsdom. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 14 commits . - [`7b11f2b`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/7b11f2b72b9fdbbe2946f9e28722ef2c661c50db) Version 9.6.0 - [`9a98748`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/9a987483bbc7037291acc3f42c367f231a48d27d) Remove test that depends on backbonejs.org - [`394b593`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/394b5935b8d2643e53b5f7281b3439d5a10b88b0) Fix copying of attribute namespace prefixes - [`f41e7bf`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/f41e7bf466dc35ac136095060957800e36f12837) Update idl conversion script to new webidl2js - [`c47eab8`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/c47eab8ca96cd3f2f00a9e2cacb92a2492c6b14a) Implement HTMLCollection @@iterator - [`13badf0`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/13badf0b0cec67b50f019442dafe091230a6b9cb) Fixe a spelling mistake - [`a6acac4`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/a6acac4e9dec4f859fff22676fb4e9eaa9139787) Add "jsdom vs. PhantomJS" to the README - [`b3e5970`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/b3e59707561923fecb6edd5112590a90c8f419ab) Update web platform test expectations - [`6ddbe2e`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/6ddbe2e23579fd0dcb79c07c99eca3bd268fd5eb) Unset stopPropagationFlags due to latest DOM spec changes - [`7088940`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/708894063694f24e1e5305fb8b630cdeda773edf) Update XHR content-type header determination - [`dc478dd`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/dc478dd764f92f6cd97c7d5e62287f13f25d3ee6) Send XHR upload loadstart events immediately - [`3590d78`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/3590d7883fab6e28b019f1ac25de6e004d9aa8be) Make File's lastModified return the current time as the default - [`e4fea5c`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/e4fea5cfd365d4826387536690f4a4d22023aa15) Roll web platform tests - [`41fa538`](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/commit/41fa53858c310a5d2632d027ebc010718239de65) Fix spurious ESLint error See the [full diff](https://github.com/tmpvar/jsdom/compare/65112fb1664d439d3b3589fdf00e7fc89b6092ae...7b11f2b72b9fdbbe2946f9e28722ef2c661c50db). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
